IPC git:status.description: Retrieves the working tree status of a Git repository path.

IPC git:log.description: Retrieves commit log history list from a Git repository path.

IPC git:fetch.description: Executes git fetch on the targeted Git repository path.

IPC git:checkout.description: Checks out a specific branch in the targeted Git repository path.

IPC dialog:openDirectory.description: Launches native window directory selection dialog to pick a folder.
